name: Mt. Zion
description_short: Mt. Zion Church is a faith-based community organization in Clarkston, MI offering spiritual services and community support programs, not consumer financial products.
description_long: Mt. Zion Church is a religious institution founded in the late 1970s by Senior Pastor Loren Covarrubias and has been serving its local community and beyond for over 40 years. The church is located at 4900 Maybee Rd in Clarkston, Michigan, and operates as a faith-based community organization rather than a financial services provider. The organization offers worship services, spiritual counseling, community events, and support programs designed to build relationships and spiritual growth among its members and surrounding community. Mt. Zion does not offer any payday loans, personal loans, emergency cash advances, credit repair services, or other consumer financial products. The church's primary function is to provide religious instruction, pastoral care, and community fellowship through various service formats and events. There are no financial services, lending products, or credit-related offerings on their website or in their stated mission.
services: Wednesday evening service with youth programming
Childcare and nursery services during services
pros: Multiple service times to accommodate different schedules and language preferences (Spanish services available)
Comprehensive childcare provided for most services including nursery, pre-K, and school-age programs
Diverse service offerings for different age groups including youth services, young adult programs, and senior services
Accessibility features including deaf interpretation available at services
Community-focused programming including discipleship classes, prayer services, and social events
Long-established organization with 40+ years of community presence and stability
Free services and programs—no membership fees or financial costs required for participation
cons: Completely miscategorized as a payday-alternative lender when it is a religious institution with no financial services
Not a consumer finance company and cannot assist with credit, loans, or financial emergencies
Website does not contain any financial product information, pricing, terms, or lending details
best_for: Individuals seeking spiritual community and religious services in the Clarkston, MI area
Families looking for faith-based childcare and youth programming
Spanish-speaking community members seeking worship services in their preferred language
diagnosis: Mt. Zion is a religious congregation, not a consumer finance company, and should be removed from CreditDoc entirely or recategorized as a non-profit religious organization. It offers no financial products, lending services, or credit assistance of any kind.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
